title: Update create-method tests after client_id removal
description: Existing body_json matchers hard-code the client_id (e.g. 'client-ch-001'). After auto-generation, the body matcher cannot assert an exact client_id unless the test passes an explicit override. Fix: tests that need to assert body shape should pass client_id: Some('test-id') as override. Tests that only check response deserialization can use None.
